hooks.command: if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "Auto-commit: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') - Modified files"; fi
if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "Session end auto-commit: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; fi

statusLine.command: echo "📊 Tokens: $(grep -o '"token_count":[0-9]*' ~/.claude/stats-cache.json 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | cut -d: -f2 || echo '?') | ⏱️ Session: $(($(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y ~/.claude/history.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo $(date +%s)))) s"
